name: First Baptist Church
description: Come play pickleball at First Baptist Church in Deming, NM! There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private.

name: First United Methodist Church
description: Come play pickleball at First United Methodist Church in Deming, NM! There are 3 indoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A one-time fee is required to play.
hours: Thursday, 9 AM to Noon and 1 to 5 PM
